belier.intro: The Moon shifts into Virgo today at 6 degrees, now 13 percent illuminated, moving into your sixth house of daily routine and practical service. Mercury retrograde continues through your fourth house, still tangling domestic conversations, while Neptune retrograde lingers in your own sign. The Cancer Sun deepens further into your third house, favoring precise, grounded words over bold declarations.
belier.love: Small acts of practical care speak louder than romantic gestures today. Offering real, useful help to someone close carries more weight than words.
belier.work: Organization and detail work suit today's Virgo Moon far better than big creative leaps. Tidy up loose ends from your recent projects.
belier.energy: Your fire settles into a more methodical rhythm today, well suited to checklists and small completions rather than bold new starts.
belier.intuition: Neptune retrograde continues asking where you have confused confidence with certainty. Today's practical Virgo light makes that distinction easier to see.
belier.mantra: I care for what matters through small, useful acts.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Virgo Moon at 6 degrees moves into your fifth house of creativity and pleasure today, a welcome shift from recent domestic focus. Mercury retrograde continues through your third house, still asking for careful communication about home matters. The Cancer Sun in your second house keeps material security warm and present in your thinking.
taureau.love: A lighter, more playful mood enters a relationship today. Let creative shared activity, not just domestic comfort, nourish the bond.
taureau.work: A creative or personal project benefits from renewed attention today. The practical Virgo Moon helps you refine details you overlooked before.
taureau.energy: Your grounded nature meets a touch of lightness today, a good balance for enjoying small pleasures without losing your usual steadiness.
taureau.intuition: A feeling about a creative pursuit or a personal joy deserves attention today. Trust what genuinely delights you over what merely looks productive.
taureau.mantra: I make room for joy alongside my steady work.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Virgo Moon, ruled by your own Mercury, moves into your fourth house today, turning attention toward home and inner foundations. Mercury itself remains retrograde in your own sign, so reflections about your roots may surface tangled memories before clarity. The Cancer Sun continues through your first house, keeping personal needs close to the surface.
gemeaux.love: A conversation about home or family history benefits from patience today. Old feelings may resurface; let them be examined rather than dismissed.
gemeaux.work: Working from home or handling domestic administrative tasks suits today's Virgo Moon particularly well. Organize before you communicate.
gemeaux.energy: Your usual mental quickness turns inward today, better suited to organizing your own space and thoughts than engaging widely with others.
gemeaux.intuition: A feeling about your living situation or family pattern deserves a second look today. Mercury retrograde often reveals what was previously overlooked.
gemeaux.mantra: I organize my inner home with patient care.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun approaches 25 degrees in your own sign as the Moon moves into Virgo and your third house of communication today. Mercury retrograde continues through your twelfth house, still surfacing memory and reflection. Neptune retrograde in Aries keeps your tenth house of career gently unclear, though the fog continues to thin with each passing day.
cancer.love: Clear, practical conversation serves a relationship well today. Say the specific thing rather than circling around a general feeling.
cancer.work: Correspondence, small logistics, and short tasks move smoothly under today's Virgo Moon. Save major financial decisions for another day.
cancer.energy: Your emotional steadiness continues, now paired with a more practical, communicative mood. Use this combination to tie up small loose ends.
cancer.intuition: A specific detail from your recent reflections is ready to be named clearly today. Trust the precision of what surfaces.
cancer.mantra: I name what I know with clear, gentle precision.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon moves into practical Virgo today, settling into your second house of resources and self-worth, a grounding shift after several days of inward reflection. Mercury retrograde in your twelfth house still favors private processing over public announcement. The Cancer Sun in your twelfth house continues to add emotional depth beneath the surface.
lion.love: A practical gesture of generosity or reliability strengthens a bond today more than a grand romantic display would.
lion.work: Financial review and resource planning suit today's mood well. Ground your recent personal intention in something concrete and measurable.
lion.energy: Your vitality takes a more practical shape today, well suited to tasks that produce a visible, tangible result.
lion.intuition: A quiet sense about your own worth, separate from what you produce, deserves attention today. Notice where the two have been confused.
lion.mantra: I ground my worth in something steady and true.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon returns to your own sign today at 6 degrees, a welcoming and clarifying shift after days spent in your hidden twelfth house. Mercury, your ruler, remains retrograde in your eleventh house, still complicating group plans. The Cancer Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendship and community emotionally present even as some threads remain tangled.
vierge.love: Your own needs and preferences become easier to name today under the Moon's return to your sign. Speak them plainly; the response is likely to be better than expected.
vierge.work: This is a good day to reassess a group project or shared goal with clear eyes. Mercury's retrograde motion continues to protect you from a premature decision.
vierge.energy: Your energy sharpens and steadies today with the Moon at home in your sign. Use this clarity to reset your own priorities.
vierge.intuition: Your instincts about yourself are especially reliable today. Trust what you know to be true about your own needs over what others expect of you.
vierge.mantra: I trust what I know to be true about myself.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Virgo Moon moves into your twelfth house today, drawing your attention inward after several days of social and professional focus. Mercury retrograde continues through your tenth house, still asking you to revisit rather than initiate career conversations. The Cancer Sun in your tenth house keeps your public path emotionally significant.
balance.love: A quiet, private moment with someone close serves a relationship better than a public or social one today. Let intimacy replace performance.
balance.work: Behind-the-scenes preparation matters more than visible action today. Use this quieter phase to reconsider your professional path from a place of rest.
balance.energy: Your usual social energy turns inward today, asking for rest rather than engagement. Honor this without guilt.
balance.intuition: A message from a quiet or dreamlike moment today carries information about your career direction. Do not dismiss it as unrelated.
balance.mantra: I let quiet reflection guide my next public step.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Virgo Moon moves into your eleventh house of friendship and future vision today, a welcome shift toward community after recent career focus. Mercury retrograde in your ninth house still asks for a second look before finalizing travel, publishing, or educational plans. The Cancer Sun in your ninth house keeps your search for meaning emotionally alive.
scorpion.love: A friend's honest perspective on a relationship carries real weight today. Consider it seriously rather than defensively.
scorpion.work: Group or community connections may offer useful support for a long-term goal today. Stay open to unexpected practical help.
scorpion.energy: Your ambition finds companionship today rather than solitary focus. Let shared momentum carry some of the weight.
scorpion.intuition: A feeling about which future goals genuinely align with your community, versus which merely look impressive, becomes clearer today.
scorpion.mantra: I let genuine connection support my larger goals.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Virgo Moon moves into your tenth house of career and public standing today, bringing a more practical, grounded energy to your usual expansiveness. Mercury retrograde in your eighth house still asks for care with shared resources or emotionally weighted conversations. The Cancer Sun in your eighth house continues to deepen the emotional undertone of intimate matters.
sagittaire.love: Practical reliability matters more than grand gestures in a close relationship today. Show up consistently rather than dramatically.
sagittaire.work: Career matters benefit from careful, detail-oriented attention today rather than bold new ventures. Refine your public image with precision.
sagittaire.energy: Your usual expansive fire narrows into focused, practical ambition today. Use it to complete rather than to explore.
sagittaire.intuition: A practical detail about your reputation or a shared resource that you overlooked before becomes visible today. Attend to it.
sagittaire.mantra: I build my reputation with careful, honest work.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Virgo Moon moves into your ninth house of belief and horizon today, a fellow earth sign bringing grounded expansion after recent intimate focus. Mercury retrograde in your seventh house still favors reviewing partnership communication over new agreements. The Cancer Sun in your seventh house keeps a significant relationship emotionally central.
capricorne.love: A conversation about shared values or long-term beliefs benefits a relationship today. Look for practical alignment, not just emotional connection.
capricorne.work: Educational or long-distance matters move forward more smoothly today than yesterday's contract review. Ground any big idea in a concrete plan.
capricorne.energy: Your steady discipline finds a natural outlet today in pursuits that combine bigger meaning with practical structure.
capricorne.intuition: A belief or worldview you have long held deserves practical testing today. Notice where theory and lived experience diverge.
capricorne.mantra: I test my beliefs against real, lived experience.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Virgo Moon moves into your eighth house of intimacy and shared resources today, asking for deeper honesty after recent partnership focus. Pluto retrograde continues its slow transformation within your own sign. Mercury retrograde in your sixth house still asks for patience with daily routines and health matters, while the Cancer Sun in your sixth house keeps your body's needs present.
verseau.love: A deeper, more vulnerable conversation with a partner is possible today. Practical honesty about shared resources may open real closeness.
verseau.work: A financial or resource-sharing matter benefits from precise, unemotional review today. Numbers and details clarify what feeling alone could not.
verseau.energy: Your body asks for careful attention to detail today, particularly around habits that affect deeper wellbeing rather than surface routine.
verseau.intuition: Pluto's ongoing inner work continues, and today a specific, practical insight about a shared bond becomes available. Act on it thoughtfully.
verseau.mantra: I meet intimacy with honesty and practical care.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Virgo Moon moves into your seventh house of partnership today, its opposite-sign practicality offering a useful mirror to your own more fluid nature. Neptune, your ruler, remains retrograde in Aries within your second house, still clarifying your relationship with worth and security. Mercury retrograde in your fifth house continues to ask for patience with creative or romantic plans.
poissons.love: A partner's practical perspective on a matter you have been feeling your way through offers real value today. Let structure support your intuition rather than compete with it.
poissons.work: Collaborative work benefits from clear, specific agreements today rather than vague good intentions. Put things in writing where you can.
poissons.energy: Your usual dreamy flow meets a grounding influence today. Use this combination to turn a vague feeling into a concrete next step.
poissons.intuition: Neptune's retrograde continues its clarifying work, and today a partner or practical detail helps translate a feeling into something you can act on.
poissons.mantra: I let structure help my intuition take real shape.
poissons.author: Sibylle
